rationale: Ground truth has no substantive reviewer concerns, so both trivially satisfy recall. Both candidates independently raise the same grounded, low-severity nit about sm_110a/cc 11.x being excluded by the `==10` gate, and both do credible repo-wide verification of the rename and callers. Y additionally catches a second grounded, actionable gap (missing (10,1)/sm_101a test parametrize case, directly traceable to the sm_101a mention in the new test docstring) and its COMMENT verdict is more consistent with the concrete suggestions it makes, whereas X hedges its one nit as low-signal and leans toward a clean APPROVE, slightly undercutting its own actionability. X has marginally more precise line citations, but Y's broader, still well-grounded coverage edges it out.
